overall.description: Gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG (Hogwarts Legacy) showing a character in wizard school uniform exploring a gothic castle interior. The character moves from a blue-lit dormitory through a warm-lit bathroom and ascends a grand stone staircase to a hall with armor statues.

scene_state.functional_zone: dormitory bedroom with bunk beds and blue decor

events.description: character exits bedroom through wooden door into stone hallway
entering bathroom area with warmer artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the dormitory room toward the exit, passing the bunk bed and wardrobe

entered.detail: wooden bunk bed with blue velvet curtains and drapes
tall dark wood cabinet with vertical paneling
brown tufted leather chair with wooden legs
stone steps with carved wooden bannister leading downward
arched wooden door with metal handle leading to bathroom

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a blue-lit dormitory bedroom featuring a four-poster bunk bed with velvet curtains. The character walks past a wooden wardrobe and leather armchair, exiting through a door into a stone hallway with a staircase visible to the right, then approaches the bathroom entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle bathroom with vintage fixtures and clawfoot tubs

events.description: lighting shifts to warm yellow artificial light from wall sconces
character turns around and walks back toward the bathroom exit

agents.ego_description: walking through the bathroom examining the clawfoot tubs and vintage sink area, then turning to exit

entered.detail: white porcelain tub with brass feet and fixtures, surrounded by red curtains
large cylindrical stone column with red banding
ornate white wooden vanity with multiple sinks and mirrors
green painted wooden toilet stall doors with decorative vents
brass wall-mounted light fixture with blue glass shade

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious bathroom with warm yellow lighting and hexagonal tile floors. The space features clawfoot bathtubs surrounded by red velvet curtains, stone pillars, and vintage sink counters with mirrors. The character explores the area, passing green wooden stall doors, then turns to exit back toward the door.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone staircase with gothic architecture and tall windows

events.description: exiting bathroom back into the cool-lit stone hallway
character stops on the landing to look at a large landscape painting
reaching the top of the stairs and entering the grand hall with armor statues

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand wooden staircase, pausing to examine a landscape painting on the landing, then continuing to the top

entered.detail: wide wooden staircase with carved gothic railings and stone balustrades
grey stone block walls with wooden wainscoting and tall arched windows
large arched landscape painting with golden ornate frame depicting a lake and mountains
full suit of medieval armor standing on display at the top of the stairs
long blue fabric banner hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character exits the bathroom and begins ascending a grand wooden staircase within a gothic stone tower. Natural blue light filters through tall arched windows. The character pauses at a landing to view a large landscape painting in a golden frame, then continues climbing to reach a grand hall at the top where suits of armor stand guard beside blue house banners.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cool-toned private bedroom through a warm interior space and up into a grand gothic hall. It begins in a blue-lit dormitory, moving past a velvet four-poster bed and wooden furniture before exiting into a stone hallway. As the character enters the adjacent bathroom, the lighting shifts to a warm yellow glow reflecting off hexagonal tiles and clawfoot tubs draped in red velvet. The scene then transitions back into the cool air of a stone tower as the camera ascends a grand wooden staircase, passing tall arched windows and a large golden-framed painting. Finally, the climb culminates in a spacious upper hall where suits of armor stand guard beneath hanging blue house banners.
